views.markdown:
## The most advanced rootless CrashReporter

Real-time crash monitoring across 19 system paths with automatic jailbreak detection and iOS version range validation.

**35 languages** · **iOS 15–18**
SIGSEGV · SIGABRT · SIGBUS · SIGFPE · SIGILL · SIGTRAP · EXC_BAD_ACCESS · EXC_CRASH · EXC_RESOURCE · EXC_GUARD · EXC_BAD_INSTRUCTION · Watchdog · Jetsam · Kernel Panics · Tweak/DYLIB · JB Errors

- **Dashboard** — Live monitoring, crash stats, JB environment
- **Crash List** — Visible/Relevant/System/Noise filtering
- **Crash Detail** — Summary, Stack Trace (classic + IPS JSON + Microstackshot), syntax-highlighted Raw Log
- **Tweak Conflict Detector** — Ranks tweaks by danger score
- **Auto-Blame Engine** — Pinpoints crash culprit
- **Crash Grouping** — Trend tracking across similar crashes
- **Crash Diff** — Side-by-side comparison
- **Timeline** — Crash vs tweak install correlation
- **Live Console** — Real-time monitoring feed
- **Export** — JSON, text, Markdown reports
- **Symbolication** — Binary Image offset resolution
- **iCloud Sync** — Read/hidden state across devices
- **Analytics** — 7-day charts, hourly heatmap, top offenders
- **dpkg Integration** — Package browser with dylib listing
EN · HR · DE · FR · ES · IT · PT-BR · RU · ZH-Hans · ZH-Hant · JA · KO · AR · TR · PL · NL · VI · TH · UK · ID · SK · CS · HU · RO · BG · SR · SL · DA · SV · NB · FI · EL · HE · MS · HI

- **Symbolication** — Binary Image offset resolution
- **iCloud Sync** — Syncs read/hidden/favorite state across devices
- **35 Languages** — Full localization (178 keys each)
- **Sileo Depiction** — Native depiction page with header
- **Smart Default Tab** — Opens most useful tab per crash type
- **Auto-Back Fix** — Scan no longer pops navigation
- Build script shows actual Swift errors

- Tweak Conflict Detector, Auto-Blame, Crash Grouping
- Export (JSON/Text/Markdown), dpkg Integration
- Crash Diff, Timeline, Live Console
- JB detection with iOS ranges (Dopamine/palera1n/NathanLR)
- Microstackshot + IPS JSON stack trace parsing
- Syntax-highlighted Raw Log with JSON coloring
- JetsamEvent large log protection
- Persistent read/unread state
- Enhanced notifications with severity levels
- 11 bug fixes from v1.0.7
